How to Cite AAA

Citation formats for the original Artificial Algae Algorithm publication.

Please cite the original publication when using AAA in research. The publication details below are verified; use the DOI or ScienceDirect page rather than redistributing the article PDF unless copyright permissions allow it.

APA

Uymaz, S. A., Tezel, G., & Yel, E. (2015). Artificial algae algorithm (AAA) for nonlinear global optimization. Applied Soft Computing, 31, 153-171. https://doi.org/10.1016/j.asoc.2015.03.003

IEEE

S. A. Uymaz, G. Tezel, and E. Yel, "Artificial algae algorithm (AAA) for nonlinear global optimization," Applied Soft Computing, vol. 31, pp. 153-171, 2015, doi: 10.1016/j.asoc.2015.03.003.

BibTeX

@article{Uymaz2015ArtificialAlgaeAlgorithm,
  title = {Artificial algae algorithm (AAA) for nonlinear global optimization},
  author = {Uymaz, Sait Ali and Tezel, Gulay and Yel, Esra},
  journal = {Applied Soft Computing},
  volume = {31},
  pages = {153--171},
  year = {2015},
  doi = {10.1016/j.asoc.2015.03.003},
  publisher = {Elsevier}
}
